chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Crl. Transfer Application No.S-90 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. 1.For orders on office objection 2.For hearing of main case 08-09-2023 Mr. Alam Sher Bozdar, Advocate for applicant. Mr. Aftab Ahmed Shar, Additional P.G for the State. ***** Mr. Ghulam Murtaza Samejo, Advocate has filed power on behalf of respondents, which is taken on record. This Crl. Transfer Application is disposed of with consent directing the trial Court to expedite the trial and conclude it within three months. JUDGE Ahmad
